scripts.test:contract: pnpm --filter @caseweaver/attachments run build && pnpm --filter @caseweaver/object-storage run build && pnpm --filter @caseweaver/attachment-runtime run build && vitest run tests/contract/ai tests/contract/attachments tests/contract/connectors
scripts.test:integration: pnpm --filter @caseweaver/postgres run test:integration && pnpm --filter @caseweaver/queue-postgres run test:integration
scripts.deps:check: depcruise --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs apps packages connectors providers infrastructure --output-type err
scripts.ci: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm deps:check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm test
